evals.prompt: Create an execution plan from this PRD file: create-plan-workspace/test-prds/small-prd.md
evals.expected_output: A self-contained PLAN.md with all mandatory ExecPlan sections, concrete file paths, commands, and observable validation steps for a health check endpoint

evals.prompt: I have a multi-epic PRD for a user authentication system. Please turn it into implementation plans: create-plan-workspace/test-prds/multi-epic-prd.md
evals.expected_output: Multiple ExecPlans (one per epic or a well-structured single plan with distinct milestones) covering all 5 epics, each with self-contained context, concrete steps, and validation

evals.prompt: Create a plan from this PRD: create-plan-workspace/test-prds/ambiguous-prd.md
evals.expected_output: The skill should flag the ambiguities (unspecified framework, TBD database, vague acceptance criteria) before proceeding, and either resolve them or note them prominently in the plan
